tagline: We are here so you worry less

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Our Problem Your
Peace of Mind
hero.subheadline: Every Hofmann Pools client gets a dedicated specialist who knows your pool inside and out. No rotating crews, no guesswork — just crystal clear water backed by our Clear Pool Guarantee, week after week.

services.label: What We Do
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Your Dedicated Specialist
services.subtitle: From leak detection to weekly maintenance, Hofmann Pools handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can spend your time swimming instead of stressing.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Expert identification and repair of pool leaks using professional diagnostic methods. We stop water loss fast and prevent costly structural damage to your pool.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems — we diagnose and fix it right the first time. Most repairs completed same-visit so your pool stays running.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Recurring maintenance backed by our Clear Pool Guarantee. Water chemistry, skimming, brushing, and filter cleaning — your pool stays swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Pool Restoration
cards.description: Aging or neglected pool? We bring it back to life with deep cleaning, equipment overhaul, and complete water treatment. Like getting a brand new pool.

cards.title: Equipment Consultation
cards.description: Personalized guidance on your pool equipment and systems. We help you understand how your pool works and what it needs to run at peak performance.

cards.title: Emergency Pool Service
cards.description: Same-day response when your pool has a problem that cannot wait. Will and the team are ready to jump in and get your pool back on track fast.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call or fill out the form. Will or a team member will come out, assess your pool, and give you an honest, no-pressure quote. No contracts, no commitments.

steps.title: Meet Your Dedicated Specialist
steps.description: You get assigned one specialist who learns your pool inside and out. They handle every visit, so nothing gets missed and you always know who is showing up.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool, Worry-Free
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear under our Clear Pool Guarantee. If it is not perfect after any visit, we come back and make it right — no questions asked.

about.label: Why Charlotte Trusts Hofmann Pools
about.headline: Owner-Operated Since 2015 — Your Pool Is Personal to Us
about.description: When Will Hofmann started Hofmann Pools in 2015, he had one mission: make pool ownership enjoyable, not exhausting. Eleven years later, that mission drives every decision. Our team — led by Will alongside Service Manager Jack Morris and Senior Repair Technician Matthew Keehnle — treats your pool like their own. Every client gets a dedicated specialist, not a revolving door of strangers. That personal touch, backed by our Clear Pool Guarantee, is why Charlotte homeowners keep coming back.

features.title: Your Dedicated Pool Specialist
features.description: One technician assigned to your pool who knows its history, quirks, and needs. Consistent care from someone who treats your backyard like their own.

features.title: Clear Pool Guarantee
features.description: Every weekly maintenance plan is backed by our guarantee. If your pool is not crystal clear after a visit, we come back and fix it at no charge.

features.title: Owner-Led, Hands-On Service
features.description: Will Hofmann is still in the field, personally overseeing complex repairs and ensuring every client gets the care they deserve. You deal with the owner, not a call center.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing. No Contracts Required.
pricing.subtitle: Get a straightforward quote for exactly what your pool needs. No hidden fees, no long-term commitments — just fair pricing backed by our Clear Pool Guarantee.

guarantee.headline: Our "Clear Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool is not crystal clear after any service visit, call us and we will come back to make it right at no additional charge. Will Hofmann built this company on the belief that pool ownership should be worry-free, and we stand behind that with every single visit. Your satisfaction is not negotiable — it is guaranteed.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For emergency repairs like leaks or equipment failures, we offer same-day response. Call us at 704-312-0920 and we will get you taken care of.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. Your dedicated specialist knows your pool and will leave it in perfect shape every visit.

faqs.question: What makes Hofmann Pools different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: Every client gets a dedicated specialist — one person who learns your pool and handles every visit. Combined with our Clear Pool Guarantee and over 11 years of Charlotte-area expertise, you get consistent, accountable service you can actually rely on.

faqs.question: Am I locked into a contract?
faqs.answer: Never. We do not do contracts at Hofmann Pools. We earn your business every single visit. You can cancel anytime with zero fees or penalties — though our clients rarely want to.

faqs.question: What areas around Charlotte do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Charlotte, Huntersville, Cornelius, Davidson, Mooresville, Lake Norman, Matthews, Mint Hill, and surrounding communities in the greater Charlotte NC region.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Not only do they do a fantastic job for a reasonable price, all the employees are friendly and professional. Highly recommend Hofmann Pools for any pool service needs.

testimonials.name: Charlotte Pool Owner
testimonials.text: Will and his team are the best. So knowledgeable. They showed up on time and took the time to explain everything about our pool system. Outstanding service.

testimonials.name: Barbara R.
testimonials.text: Friendly courteous customer service. My pool is looking great thanks to Hofmann Pools. Would definitely recommend them to anyone looking for reliable pool care.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool You
Never Have to Worry About?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure pool inspection from Will and the Hofmann Pools team. No contracts, no commitments — just honest answers and a clear path to a better pool.
benefits: Clear Pool Guarantee on all plans
